title: Lesson 200: 晩ご飯, 半分, 半分...

items.gloss: eastern Japan (esp. Kamakura or Edo, from perspective of Kyoto or Nara); eastern provinces; east; wagon; yamatogoto; six-stringed native Japanese zither; my spouse
east wind tile; winning hand with a pung (or kong) of east wind tiles
